title: delphinium virescens subsp. wootonii
intro: Delphinium virescens subsp. wootonii, also known as Wooton's delphinium, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Ranunculaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, derived from its roots and leaves. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as relief from respiratory issues, fever reduction, and wound healing. Traditionally, Wooton's delphinium is prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil for its medicinal uses, although its efficacy and safety as a medicinal plant require further research and validation.
